scheme_name: Dhobhi Hetu Avashyak Upkaran Sahayata Yojana
page_title: Dhobhi Hetu Avashyak Upkaran Sahayata Yojana

details: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh introduced the "Dhobhi Hetu Avashyak Upkaran Sahayata Yojana" on January 10, 2018, through the "Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board." Under this scheme, the washerman is provided with materials worth Rs. 1,500/-, including electronic/coal iron, clothespins, and a washing paddle (Thappi/Kutela).
benefits: Provided materials worth ₹1,500/-, including electronic/coal iron, clothespins, and a washing paddle (Thappi/Kutela).
eligibility: Applicant must be registered Unorganized worker of State Social Security Board.
The applicant should be a Dhobhi.
Applicant age must be between 18 to 60 years.

On the home page click on "
" under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board".
What do you want to do : "Aavedan"
: Check the eligibility criteria for registration in Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board and click next.
All the applicant have to visit the official
Select : "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board".
What do you want to do : "Application".
Select your district name and provide old/new registration number and click proceed.
When you enter the district and registration number, an OTP will be sent to your mobile for verification.
After this, a dashboard will open in front of you, containing information about your name, address, age, and caste etc.
After that, you select your Yojana and upload your important documents and basic information.
Click "Submit" to register yourself for this scheme.

faqs.question: What is the objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The Labor Department of Chhattisgarh initiated this scheme on January 10, 2018, under the "Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board." This scheme aims to provide equipment support to dhobis.

faqs.question: What materials are provided to the washerman under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Materials worth ₹1500, including electronic/coal iron, clothespins, and a washing paddle (Thappi/Kutela).

faqs.question: What is the purpose of providing these materials?
faqs.answer: To support the washerman in their work.

faqs.question: Which department oversees the implementation of this scheme?
What is the procedure to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicant must be registered under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board". Only than applicant can apply for the scheme.

faqs.question: How to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: 1. All the applicant have to visit the official website Chhattisgarh Labour Department. 2. On the home page click on "Apply" under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board". 3. Provide the required details. 4. Fill out the application form. 5. Submit.

faqs.question: What is the official website to apply for the scheme?
What is the required age to get the benefits?
faqs.answer: Applicant age must be between 18 to 60 years.
